glue.table.schemareference.CfnAbout: An object that references a schema stored in the AWS Glue Schema Registry.

glue.table.schemareference.SchemaId.Description: A structure that contains schema identity fields. Either this or the `SchemaVersionId` has to be provided.

glue.table.schemareference.SchemaVersion.Description: The unique ID assigned to a version of the schema. Either this or the `SchemaId` has to be provided.
The version number of the schema.
